evidence_summary: Establish the ruthless efficiency of the Martian looters through a systematic stripping of a damaged vessel, transitioning from the tension of an approaching craft to the somber realization of loss.

One unmanned, damaged gray vessel drifts erratically toward the city. The green Martians capture it, systematically strip it of all valuables (arms, silks, food, water), and set it ablaze, sending it away as a drifting funeral pyre. The protagonist watches...
A single unmanned, damaged gray vessel drifts erratically toward the city outskirts.
The burning vessel drifts away as a funeral pyre while the protagonist watches.
Capture, strip valuables, ignite, and discard the vessel.
